risks.title: America's World Cup spectacle smashes expectations
risks.description:
The 2026 FIFA World Cup is delivering a masterclass in global monoculture, stacking blockbuster ratings, on-field theatrics and a superstar race for soccer immortality.
Why it matters: Skeptics spent months bracing for the World Cup to collide with a polarize…

risks.title: Norway 'Robbed' by Referee: Alfie Haaland
risks.description: Former Norway international Alf-Inge 'Alfie' Haaland expressed his disappointment after Norway's FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign ended with a 2-1 extra-time defeat to England, claiming the Scandinavian side had been 'robbed' in the contest.

risks.title: 'We lived up to the hype'
risks.description: An emotional Stale Solbakken praised Norway's historic FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign after a 2-1 extra-time defeat to England ended their dream run in the quarter-finals.
